{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260323024228CBBBB2AD0512E2971E72\"}"},"total":2392},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7150660536273847055","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"豆腐，我都追你的书三四年了，这本书真的好好看，就是更的有点慢，剧情也很精彩，真希望看到江帆25级横扫一切的时候。加油豆腐，我会一直支持你的[飞吻][飞吻]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1664892964,"group_id":"6782439250995448846","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"读书破万卷，下笔如有神","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9htuMc0/c3SUJ7Ju/9ewq8aIdur965RH3RxwpdI9U4o","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3470515219742223","user_name":"小小年纪的龙傲天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3470515219742223","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6782439250995448846","book_info":{"abstract":"濒死之际激活万界外卖系统，江帆从此开启了不一样的人生！给苏大强送了一杯手磨咖啡，结果回报了一本任意娶妻的结婚证！给杨贵妃送了一份麻辣小龙虾，被赏了一等国公外加岭南五百里荔枝园！给菩提老祖送了两筐猕猴桃，直接学会了七十二变！拯救武大郎，吊打西门庆！抢超人的内裤，戳绿巨人的眼睛！纵横都市，横扫花丛！系统在手，天下我有！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/73475ec6d38f576ab187115dff7ddb47","author":"宫廷豆腐","author_id":"","book_id":"6782439250995448846","book_name":"神级万界外卖员","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d0e0c8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4535人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":1016,\"name\":\"男频衍生\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016\u0026name=男频衍生\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\": 54149361255180","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情线比较完整，主角不是一般的智慧那种算计死死的就很不错。感情线有点耽误了，虽然是多女主但基本没碰过。其实我感觉火影加上去逼格也很高[撇嘴]然后就是复联一个大世界内容获得的道具但是还是有点短，当时我看就想到如果有无限手套体验卡3分钟缺少某个宝石不能打响指之类的，还有钢铁侠纳米外卖机甲等等都挺不错万界描写多点感觉会好，反派有的智商并不会无脑倒贴基本都是有目的性，虽然主角一直没死主要是保命手段多。","text_exts":[{"e":136,"s":133,"text":"钢铁侠","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E9%92%A2%E9%93%81%E4%BE%A0\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774204948E2971E72%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227241154149361255180%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%226782439250995448846%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%92%A2%E9%93%81%E4%BE%A0%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685962709,"group_id":"6782439250995448846","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NymV5Zd6DdwxjT6hAtS2S7mI45W3yeWXtBH7dxuUkips","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8fbda997c567471191b07430a5e0323d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776788441\u0026x-signature=bh2xrVPd2UzDceRr2O6rJk6ZQWY%3D","user_id":"4490832520181326","user_name":"吃泡面也加汤"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4490832520181326","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1722355797,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E4F5CD","can_worn":false,"id":3,"name":"烂尾督察员","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/972e1bec4437ce8e045aaf8e3bbfe1aa","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-n
